story.title: COVID-19 Oral History with Chuck Winder
story.description: The interview with Senator Pro Tem Chuck Winder of the Idaho State Legislature conducted by HannaLore Hein, the state historian for the Idaho State Historical Society, primarily explores the state's handling of the COVID-19 pandemic. Topics include the Senator's early exposure to COVID-19 news, legislative actions in response, the impact of emergency declarations, and the legislature's subsequent efforts to address government authority during emergencies. The Senator reflects on Idaho's economic resilience amid the pandemic, the controversy surrounding vaccine mandates, and political pressures from interest groups. Personal anecdotes, including memories of past health crises, highlight the interview's historical context.
